records.invariant_notes: Collapse/expand and solver transitions must preserve aggregate mass ledger under declared approximation bounds.
transition_requirements: domain/contract binding must be declared on selected solver

records.invariant_notes: Energy-like aggregates must remain balanced during deterministic tier transitions.
transition_requirements: solver numeric bounds must be declared

records.invariant_notes: Charge and signed quantities must preserve deterministic aggregate balance.
transition_requirements: contract binding must exist for selected solver

records.invariant_notes: Credit/debit ledgers must remain balanced and auditable through transitions.
transition_requirements: domain and solver must declare ledger-bearing contract support

records.invariant_notes: Observation outputs must not leak unavailable truth fields beyond law/lens/authority constraints.
transition_requirements: observation projection must remain lens/law/authority gated across transitions

records.invariant_notes: For identical inputs, transition ordering and resulting state hashes are stable.
transition_requirements: sorted deterministic ordering for transition candidates

records.invariant_notes: Input/output port semantics must remain structurally compatible across collapse/expand transitions.
transition_requirements: transition participants must preserve required structural ports
